meta.description: Revoke.cash是由Rosco Kalis在2019年创建的，是一个管理用户代币审批的工具。从那时起，它已经发展成为web3安全领域的主力军。
meta.title: 关于我们

batch_revoke.description: A much-requested feature, users can now revoke multiple approvals in a single flow with queued transactions.
batch_revoke.title: Batch Revoking

beyond_approvals.description: Revoke.cash expands beyond approval management with new tabs for managing delegations and viewing approval history.
beyond_approvals.title: Delegations & History Tabs

created.description: Inspired by Paul Berg's talk at Devcon 5, Rosco Kalis builds the first token approval management tool, giving users a way to revoke unlimited approvals.
created.title: Revoke.cash Created

extension.description: The crypto ecosystem sees a large increase in scams and phishing attacks. Rosco releases a browser extension that warns users before signing risky approvals, providing proactive protection.
extension.title: Browser Extension Launch

extension_overhaul.description: The threat landscape is constantly evolving, and the browser extension needs to stay ahead. Revoke.cash partners with Fairside to build a new extension with improved detection, UX and risk coverage.
extension_overhaul.title: Extension Overhaul

full_time.description: After leaving his previous startup, Rosco decides to focus on Revoke.cash full-time, turning it from a side project into a mission.
full_time.title: Going Full-Time

learn_section.description: While tools are an important part of security, it does not replace the need for education. A Learn Section is added to help users understand wallet security.
learn_section.title: Learn Section

multichain.description: The EVM ecosystem is growing rapidly, and Revoke.cash expands beyond Ethereum to support dozens of EVM-compatible networks.
multichain.title: Multichain Expansion

nft_support.description: As NFTs rise in popularity, many users are giving approvals to marketplaces like OpenSea. Revoke.cash becomes the first tool to support revoking NFT approvals, expanding beyond ERC20 tokens.
nft_support.title: NFT Approval Support

premium.description: With a decline in public goods funding, Revoke.cash needs to find a sustainable business model. Revoke Premium is launched to generate real revenue.
premium.title: Revoke Premium

redesign.description: At this point, Revoke.cash has had the same visual design since 2019. To pave the way for the future, a complete visual overhaul of the Revoke.cash dashboard and website is released.
redesign.title: Website Redesign

single_tx_batch.description: EIP7702 enables revoking multiple approvals in a single transaction, massively improving the user experience of batch revoking.
single_tx_batch.title: Single-Transaction Batch Revoke

team_retropgf.description: Optimism RetroPGF provides major funding, enabling the first team expansion. In 2024, the team grows to include Dries and WiiMee as part-time team members.
team_retropgf.title: Team Growth & RetroPGF
